home.meta.title: Dej-Udom & Associates — Attorneys at Law, Bangkok
home.meta.desc: Full-service law firm in Bangkok advising multinational companies on intellectual property, immigration, corporate law, litigation, and taxation across Thailand and ASEAN since 1986.
common.nav.subtitle: Attorneys At Law
home.hero.title:
Legal expertise
with a commercial edge
home.hero.desc: A partner-led law firm advising multinational companies and foreign investors across intellectual property, immigration, corporate law, litigation, and taxation.
home.values.v1_desc: IP, immigration, corporate, litigation, and tax under one roof.
home.values.v2_desc: Thai and English fluency across every filing and submission.
home.values.v3_desc: Authorised to submit LTR Visa applications directly to BOI.
home.practices.label: Expertise
home.practices.title: What We Do
home.practices.intro: Full-spectrum commercial legal services with hands-on partner involvement and deep industry knowledge.
home.practices.ip.name: Intellectual Property
home.practices.ip.desc: Trademark, patent, and copyright protection across Thailand and ASEAN — from filing and registration through to enforcement, licensing, and commercialisation.
home.practices.immigration.name: Immigration & Relocation
home.practices.immigration.desc: Work permits, visas, and the Long-Term Resident (LTR) Visa programme. BOI Certified Agency for direct LTR submissions.
home.practices.corporate.name: Corporate & Investment
home.practices.corporate.desc: Market entry structuring, M&A, BOI promotion applications, joint ventures, and ongoing regulatory compliance for businesses operating in Thailand.
home.practices.litigation.name: Litigation & Dispute Resolution
home.practices.litigation.desc: Complex commercial disputes across Thailand's civil, criminal, and specialised courts. Domestic and international arbitration and mediation.
home.practices.tax.name: Taxation
home.practices.tax.desc: Corporate income tax, VAT, customs and excise, transfer pricing, double tax treaty application, and BOI tax incentives for inbound investments.
home.practices.notarial.name: Notarial Services
home.practices.notarial.desc: Document certification, signature authentication, sworn statements, and powers of attorney for use in Thailand and foreign jurisdictions.
home.overlay.label: Practice Area
home.overlay.ip.title: Intellectual Property
home.overlay.ip.overview: Our IP Department handles every stage of intellectual property protection in Thailand and across the region — from initial filing and registration through to enforcement, licensing, and commercialisation.
home.overlay.ip.trademark.title: Trademark
home.overlay.ip.trademark.body:
We advise on the full lifecycle of trademark protection under Thai law: clearance searches, filing, prosecution, opposition and cancellation proceedings, renewals, assignments, and licensing.

Where brand owners face infringement, we coordinate enforcement through the Department of Intellectual Property, Thai Customs, and the Central Intellectual Property and International Trade Court.

For companies entering the Thai market, we provide clearance opinions and filing strategies that account for the classification requirements and examination practices of the Thai DIP.
home.overlay.ip.trademark.handles: Registration and prosecution, opposition and cancellation, enforcement and anti-counterfeiting, customs recordals, licensing and assignments, passing off, IP commercialisation, portfolio management and renewals.
home.overlay.ip.patent.title: Patent
home.overlay.ip.patent.body:
We advise on patent protection for inventions, industrial designs, and petty patents (utility models) under the Thai Patent Act.

For invention patents, we handle drafting and filing of applications, prosecution through the DIP, responses to official actions, and maintenance of granted patents through the 20-year term. Thailand offers several mechanisms to accelerate examination — including ASPEC, the Patent Prosecution Highway (PPH) with the Japan Patent Office, and the Target Patent Fast-Track.

For PCT national phase applications, we manage entry into the Thai national phase, coordinate Thai-language translation, and prosecute applications through examination.
home.overlay.ip.patent.handles: Invention patents, design patents, petty patents, PCT national phase entry, patent prosecution, accelerated examination (ASPEC, PPH, Target Patent), annuity management, assignments and licence recordals.
home.overlay.ip.overseas.title: Overseas IP
home.overlay.ip.overseas.body:
For clients who need IP protection beyond Thailand, our overseas filing desk coordinates trademark and patent applications across ASEAN and internationally.

Through our memberships in INTA, APAA, and the International Lawyers Network, we have direct access to vetted practitioners in over 50 countries.
home.overlay.ip.overseas.handles: Multi-jurisdiction trademark and patent filings across ASEAN, international filing coordination through ILN and INTA networks, Madrid Protocol designations, inbound PCT national phase management, consolidated portfolio reporting.
home.overlay.immigration.title: Immigration & Relocation
home.overlay.immigration.overview: Our Immigration Department advises on all aspects of employing foreign nationals in Thailand. Since March 2023, we are a BOI Certified Agency for the Long-Term Resident (LTR) Visa.
home.overlay.immigration.workpermits.bod:
We handle new work permit applications, renewals, amendments, and cancellations under both the BOI single-window system and the standard process through the Department of Employment.

For BOI-promoted companies, applications are processed through TIESC using the online single-window system. For non-BOI companies, we handle applications through TIESC or the Employment Department directly.
home.overlay.immigration.workpermits.han: BOI and non-BOI work permit applications, renewals and amendments, Digital Work Permits (DWP), temporary and urgent work permits, work permit cancellations, change of employer, medical certificate coordination.
home.overlay.immigration.visas.title: Visas
home.overlay.immigration.visas.body: We advise on the full range of visa categories available to foreign nationals in Thailand, including Non-Immigrant B visas, dependent visas, retirement visas, Smart Visa, and permanent residency applications.
home.overlay.immigration.visas.handles: Non-Immigrant B and O visas, visa extensions and renewals, dependent visas, retirement visas, Smart Visa, permanent residency, re-entry permits, 90-day reporting, transfer of endorsement, overseas visa support letters.
home.overlay.immigration.ltr.title: Long-Term Resident (LTR) Visa
home.overlay.immigration.ltr.body:
The LTR Visa is a 10-year visa programme administered by the BOI, available to four categories: wealthy global citizens, wealthy pensioners, work-from-Thailand professionals, and highly-skilled professionals.

As a BOI Certified Agency, we manage the entire application process — from eligibility assessment through document preparation, submission, and obtaining the visa stamp and Digital Work Permit.
home.overlay.immigration.ltr.handles: LTR Visa eligibility assessment and pre-screening, application preparation and filing, coordination with the BOI LTR Unit, visa stamp and Digital Work Permit issuance, dependent applications, renewals, annual reporting.
home.overlay.corporate.title: Corporate & Investment
home.overlay.corporate.overview: Our Corporate Department advises multinational corporations, joint ventures, SMEs, and entrepreneurs on establishing and operating businesses in Thailand.
home.overlay.corporate.entry.title: Market Entry & Formation
home.overlay.corporate.entry.body:
We advise on the most appropriate legal structure for entering the Thai market, taking into account the Foreign Business Act, BOI incentives, and your commercial objectives.

This includes incorporation of Thai limited companies, registration of branch offices, joint venture structuring, and applications for Foreign Business Licences (FBL).
home.overlay.corporate.entry.handles: Company incorporation, joint venture structuring, Foreign Business Licence applications, BOI promotion applications, IEAT privileges, factory licences, import/export permits, business licensing.
home.overlay.corporate.ma.title: Transactions & M&A
home.overlay.corporate.ma.body: We advise on acquisitions, disposals, mergers, and corporate restructuring transactions in Thailand, covering the full transaction cycle from structuring through to completion.
home.overlay.corporate.ma.handles: Mergers and acquisitions, due diligence, share and asset purchase agreements, shareholders' agreements, corporate restructuring, joint venture agreements, regulatory approvals.
home.overlay.corporate.compliance.title: Ongoing Compliance & Licensing
home.overlay.corporate.compliance.body: For companies already operating in Thailand, we provide ongoing corporate secretarial and regulatory compliance support, including annual returns, board administration, and BOI reporting.
home.overlay.corporate.compliance.handle: Corporate secretarial services, annual compliance filings, board and shareholder meeting administration, BOI compliance and reporting, licence renewals, regulatory advisory, monthly retainer arrangements.
home.overlay.litigation.title: Litigation & Dispute Resolution
home.overlay.litigation.overview: Our Litigation Department handles complex, high-value disputes across Thailand's civil, criminal, and specialised courts — as well as arbitration and mediation.
home.overlay.litigation.body:
The department represents clients from the Courts of First Instance through to the Supreme Court, with depth in commercial disputes, employment matters, IP and international trade cases, and tax disputes.

For disputes involving international parties, we handle matters before the Thai Arbitration Institute and advise on enforcement of foreign arbitral awards under the New York Convention.

Our approach: clear assessment of merits, likely timeline, and costs at the outset — pursuing resolution through the most practical route available.
home.overlay.litigation.handles: Civil and commercial litigation, criminal defence, labour and employment disputes, IP and international trade court, tax court, bankruptcy, domestic and international arbitration, mediation, enforcement of foreign judgments and arbitral awards.
home.overlay.tax.title: Taxation
home.overlay.tax.overview: We advise on all matters relating to taxation in Thailand, covering both planning and compliance for businesses and individuals.
home.overlay.tax.body:
Corporate side: structuring advice on corporate income tax, VAT, customs and excise, specific business tax, withholding tax, and transfer pricing. We assist with tax planning for inbound investments and advise on Thailand's double tax treaties (61 countries).

Individual clients: personal income tax for expatriates, tax residency issues, and the reduced 17% flat rate under the LTR Visa programme.

Our tax practice coordinates closely with corporate and immigration departments, particularly on BOI-promoted investments.
home.overlay.tax.handles: Corporate income tax, VAT advisory, customs and excise, withholding tax, transfer pricing, double tax treaties, tax audit defence, personal income tax for expatriates, BOI tax incentives, cross-border tax structuring.
home.overlay.notarial.title: Notarial Services
home.overlay.notarial.overview: Licensed Notarial Services Attorneys providing full notarial services for domestic and international clients under the Lawyers Act B.E. 2528.
home.overlay.notarial.body: Relevant for foreign companies and individuals requiring notarised or certified documents for use in Thailand or other jurisdictions — including powers of attorney, certified copies, signature verification, and sworn statements.
home.overlay.notarial.handles: Certification of document copies, signature verification and authentication, recording of statements under oath, administration of oaths, ID verification, powers of attorney for foreign jurisdictions.
home.why.label: The Firm
home.why.title:
Built for
Cross-Border Work
home.why.intro: Over 80% of our clients are foreign companies or multinational firms. That concentration shapes how we work.
home.why.item1_desc: Four decades of institutional knowledge advising Fortune 500 companies and multinational enterprises since 1986.
home.why.item2_desc: Thailand's exclusive member of the International Lawyers Network since 1995, connecting clients to 6,000+ vetted practitioners worldwide.
home.why.item3_desc: Deep specialisation in manufacturing, automotive, life sciences, energy, technology, consumer, financial services, and international trade.
home.why.item4_desc: Thai and English fluency across all practice areas ensures clarity in every legal communication, filing, and submission.
home.industries.label: Industries
home.industries.title: Sectors We Serve
home.industries.intro: Practical legal counsel shaped by years of working within each sector's regulatory landscape, commercial pressures, and government touchpoints in Thailand.
home.industries.manufacturing.name: Manufacturing
home.industries.manufacturing.desc: BOI promotion applications for manufacturing projects, factory licensing under the Factory Act, import/export permits, labour compliance for factory workforces, and environmental regulatory approvals across Thailand's industrial estates.
home.industries.automotive.name: Automotive & EV
home.industries.automotive.desc: Structuring investments under Thailand's EV incentive packages, BOI privileges for automotive parts and assembly, technology transfer agreements, supply chain joint ventures, and customs classification for components and finished vehicles.
home.industries.lifesciences.name: Life Sciences & Pharma
home.industries.lifesciences.desc: Patent filing and prosecution for pharmaceutical inventions, FDA Thailand regulatory pathways, clinical trial agreements, pharmaceutical distribution licensing, and protection of proprietary formulations and trade secrets.
home.industries.energy.name: Energy & Utilities
home.industries.energy.desc: Power purchase agreements, Energy Regulatory Commission licensing, BOI incentives for renewable energy projects, concession structuring, and dispute resolution for infrastructure and energy sector contracts.
home.industries.technology.name: Technology & Fintech
home.industries.technology.desc: Smart Visa applications for tech professionals, data protection compliance under the PDPA, fintech licensing with the Bank of Thailand and SEC, software IP protection, and corporate structuring for digital businesses.
home.industries.consumer.name: Consumer & Retail
home.industries.consumer.desc: Trademark portfolio management for consumer brands, franchise and distribution agreements, retail licensing requirements, consumer protection compliance, and anti-counterfeiting enforcement through Thai Customs and the IP Court.
home.industries.financial.name: Financial Services
home.industries.financial.desc: Foreign Business Licence applications for financial service providers, Bank of Thailand and SEC regulatory compliance, fund structuring, fintech joint ventures, and cross-border transaction advisory for regional banking clients.
home.industries.trade.name: International Trade
home.industries.trade.desc: Customs and excise advisory, free trade zone structuring, trade dispute resolution, export control compliance, and coordination with the Department of Foreign Trade on import/export licensing for controlled goods.
home.industries.logistics.name: Logistics & Supply Chain
home.industries.logistics.desc: Foreign Business Act structuring for logistics operators, warehouse and transport licensing, customs brokerage compliance, BOI privileges for international trading companies, and freight forwarding regulatory requirements.
home.industries.realestate.name: Real Estate & Infrastructure
home.industries.realestate.desc: Foreign ownership structuring under the Land Code and Condominium Act, construction permits, EIA compliance, lease and concession agreements, and BOI promotion for infrastructure projects in designated zones.
home.industries.food.name: Food & Agriculture
home.industries.food.desc: FDA product registration and labelling compliance, agricultural licensing, GI protection for Thai agricultural products, food safety regulatory requirements, and BOI incentives for food processing and cold chain operations.
home.industries.hospitality.name: Hospitality & Tourism
home.industries.hospitality.desc: Hotel and tourism business licensing, Foreign Business Act compliance for hospitality operators, work permits for expatriate hotel management, TAT registration requirements, and liquor and entertainment licensing.

about.meta.title: About Us — Dej-Udom & Associates, Attorneys at Law
about.meta.desc: Founded in 1986 by Professor Dej-Udom Krairit, Dej-Udom & Associates is a full-service Thai law firm advising multinational companies on IP, immigration, corporate law, litigation, and taxation.
about.hero.label: About the Firm
about.hero.title:
Bangkok's Multidisciplinary
Law Firm Since 1986
about.hero.desc: Founded by Professor Dej-Udom Krairit, our firm has grown from a specialist intellectual property practice into one of Bangkok's established full-service law firms — advising multinational companies across six practice areas and two working languages.
about.story.label: Our Story
about.story.p1: Professor Dej-Udom Krairit established the firm in 1986 with a single focus: providing rigorous intellectual property advice to international companies entering the Thai market. At a time when Thailand's IP framework was still developing, the firm built its reputation on technical depth and direct access to the regulatory bodies that shaped the system.
about.story.p2: Over the following decades, the practice expanded in response to what clients actually needed. Companies that came for trademark protection soon needed corporate structuring, work permits for their expatriate staff, and eventually, representation in disputes. Rather than referring these matters out, the firm built dedicated departments — each led by practitioners with genuine depth in their area.
about.story.p3: Today, Dej-Udom & Associates advises in Thai and English across intellectual property, immigration and relocation, corporate and investment law, litigation and dispute resolution, taxation, and notarial services. The approach hasn't changed: understand the client's business first, then provide advice that accounts for how Thai law actually works in practice.
about.timeline.1986: Professor Dej-Udom Krairit founds the firm as a specialist intellectual property practice in Bangkok
about.timeline.1995: Appointed sole Thai member of the International Lawyers Network (ILN), expanding cross-border capabilities
about.timeline.2005: Expands into full-service operations — adding corporate, litigation, and immigration departments
about.timeline.2018: Joins the ASEAN Attorneys Alliance, strengthening regional coverage across Southeast Asia
about.timeline.2023: Appointed BOI Certified Agency for the Long-Term Resident (LTR) Visa programme — one of a limited number of authorised firms
about.values.label: What Guides Us
about.values.title: Built on Principle
about.values.intro: Three commitments that have defined our practice for nearly four decades — and that every member of the firm is held to.
about.values.card1.title: Client-First Counsel
about.values.card1.desc: We start with the business problem, not the legal theory. Every engagement begins by understanding the client's industry context, commercial objectives, and risk tolerance — so the advice we give is actionable, not academic.
about.values.card2.title: Excellence in Delivery
about.values.card2.desc: Responsiveness, clarity, and follow-through. We meet deadlines, write in plain language, and keep clients informed at every stage. When something changes, we say so immediately — not after the fact.
about.values.card3.title: Thai Roots, Global Reach
about.values.card3.desc: Deep understanding of Thai law and regulatory practice, combined with the international network to support clients operating across borders. Through ILN and the ASEAN Attorneys Alliance, we coordinate seamlessly across jurisdictions.
about.team.label: Our People
about.team.title: Leadership & Team
about.team.intro: The people behind the practice — each bringing genuine depth in their area and a shared commitment to getting the detail right.

about.network.label: Global Network
about.network.title:
Regional Strength,
International Reach
about.network.p1: As the sole Thai member of the International Lawyers Network since 1995, we connect clients to vetted legal practitioners in over 90 firms across 67 countries. For work within Southeast Asia, our membership in the ASEAN Attorneys Alliance provides direct access to leading independent firms across every ASEAN jurisdiction.
about.network.p2: This means clients dealing with cross-border matters — whether it's a multi-jurisdiction trademark filing, a regional corporate restructuring, or an employment dispute spanning several countries — get coordinated advice through a single point of contact in Bangkok.

careers.meta.title: Careers — Dej-Udom & Associates, Attorneys at Law
careers.meta.desc: Join Dej-Udom & Associates — Bangkok's established full-service law firm. We're looking for talented legal professionals who want to grow their careers in IP, immigration, corporate law, litigation, and taxation.
careers.hero.label: Careers
careers.hero.title:
Shape the Law.
Grow Your Career
careers.hero.desc: Join a firm where merit drives progression, cross-practice collaboration is the norm, and every member contributes to work that matters — for clients, for the profession, and for Thailand's legal landscape.
careers.why.label: Why Dej-Udom
careers.why.title: What Makes Us Different
careers.why.intro: We've built a firm where talented people can do their best work — with the support, structure, and autonomy to grow on their own terms.
careers.why.card1.title: Forward-Thinking Practice
careers.why.card1.desc: We invest in legal technology and modern workflows. You'll work with tools that make practice efficient — not paperwork for the sake of it.
careers.why.card2.title: Merit-Based Growth
careers.why.card2.desc: Clear performance criteria, transparent promotion pathways, and regular feedback. Advancement here is earned — not waited for.
careers.why.card3.title: Cross-Practice Exposure
careers.why.card3.desc: Work across IP, corporate, immigration, and litigation — not in a silo. Our multidisciplinary structure means real breadth from day one.
careers.why.card4.title: Work-Life Balance
careers.why.card4.desc: Hybrid flexibility, reasonable hours, and respect for personal time. We deliver excellent work without burning people out.
careers.why.card5.title: Continuous Learning
careers.why.card5.desc: Annual CPD budget, international conference attendance, and secondment opportunities through our ILN and ASEAN network.
careers.pathway.label: Your Path
careers.pathway.title: Career Progression at D&A
careers.pathway.intro: A transparent, structured pathway from your first day to partnership — with clear milestones and development support at every stage.
careers.pathway.step1.title: Intern
careers.pathway.step1.desc: Foundation training, research assignments, court observation
careers.pathway.step2.title: Junior Associate
careers.pathway.step2.desc: Supervised client work, drafting, and filings
careers.pathway.step3.title: Associate
careers.pathway.step4.title: Senior Associate
careers.pathway.step4.desc: Team leadership, complex matters, business development
careers.pathway.step5.title: Of Counsel
careers.pathway.step6.title: Partner
careers.pathway.step6.desc: Firm leadership, practice development, strategic direction
careers.life.label: Life at D&A
careers.life.title: More Than a Workplace
careers.life.intro: A practice built on collaboration, mutual respect, and the shared belief that legal work should be intellectually rewarding.
careers.life.quote1.text: What drew me here was the chance to work across practice areas from day one. Within my first year, I was handling trademark prosecutions, assisting with corporate formations, and sitting in on immigration consultations.
careers.life.quote1.author: Associate, IP Department
careers.life.quote2.text: The partners here actually listen. When I proposed a new workflow for LTR Visa processing, it was adopted within a month. That kind of openness to ideas from junior staff is rare in Thai law firms.
careers.life.quote2.author: Senior Associate, Immigration
careers.positions.label: Open Positions
careers.positions.title: Current Opportunities
careers.positions.intro: We're always looking for talented people who share our standards. Explore current openings or submit a general application below.
careers.positions.pos1.title: Associate — Intellectual Property
careers.positions.pos1.about: Join our IP department handling trademark and patent prosecution, enforcement, and portfolio management for multinational clients. You'll work directly with brand owners on registrations, oppositions, and customs enforcement across Thailand.
careers.positions.pos1.req1: Thai lawyer's licence (or eligible to obtain one)
careers.positions.pos1.req2: 2–4 years' experience in intellectual property law
careers.positions.pos1.req3: Strong English drafting and communication skills
careers.positions.pos1.req4: Experience with DIP procedures and CIPITC litigation preferred
careers.positions.pos1.req5: Familiarity with Madrid Protocol and PCT procedures is a plus
careers.positions.pos1.offer2: CPD budget and conference attendance (INTA, APAA)
careers.positions.pos1.offer4: Clear pathway to Senior Associate and beyond
careers.positions.pos2.title: Senior Associate — Immigration
careers.positions.pos2.about: Lead our growing immigration practice — managing work permit and visa applications for corporate clients, coordinating LTR Visa submissions as a BOI Certified Agency, and mentoring junior team members. You'll handle a portfolio of multinational employers and high-net-worth individuals.
careers.positions.pos2.req2: 4–6 years' experience in Thai immigration law
careers.positions.pos2.req3: Proven track record managing high-volume corporate immigration accounts
careers.positions.pos2.req5: Experience with BOI processes and LTR Visa applications strongly preferred
careers.positions.pos2.offer3: Leadership opportunities within the immigration department
careers.positions.pos2.offer4: International network access through ILN and ASEAN Attorneys Alliance
careers.positions.pos3.title: Legal Intern — General Practice
careers.positions.pos3.about: A structured internship programme rotating across all six practice areas. You'll gain hands-on experience in IP prosecution, immigration applications, corporate filings, and court proceedings — with mentorship from senior practitioners throughout.
careers.positions.pos3.req1: Currently enrolled in or recently graduated from a Thai law programme
careers.positions.pos3.req4: Genuine interest in commercial legal practice
careers.positions.pos3.offer1: 3–6 month structured programme with rotation across departments
careers.positions.pos3.offer2: Mentorship from senior associates and partners
careers.positions.pos3.offer4: Fast-track consideration for full-time Junior Associate positions
careers.positions.unsolicited.title: Don't See Your Role?
careers.positions.unsolicited.desc: We're always interested in hearing from exceptional candidates. Send us your CV and a brief note about what you're looking for — we'll be in touch if there's a fit.
careers.process.label: How It Works
careers.process.title: Our Process
careers.process.intro: A straightforward, respectful process — we value your time and aim to move quickly.
careers.process.step1.title: Submit Application
careers.process.step1.desc: Send your CV, cover letter, and any relevant writing samples through the form below.
careers.process.step2.title: Initial Review
careers.process.step2.desc: Our team reviews every application within 5 business days. We'll get back to you either way.
careers.process.step3.title: Interview
careers.process.step3.desc: A conversation with the practice head and a member of the team. We focus on fit, not trick questions.
careers.process.step4.title: Offer
careers.process.step4.desc: If it's mutual, we'll move to an offer with clear terms, start date, and onboarding plan.
careers.apply.label: Get in Touch
careers.apply.title: Interested? Let's Talk
careers.apply.desc: Whether you're applying for a specific role or just exploring opportunities, we'd like to hear from you. Send us your details and we'll be in touch.

insights.meta.title: Insights — Dej-Udom & Associates, Attorneys at Law
insights.meta.desc: Legal updates, thought leadership, and practical guidance from Dej-Udom & Associates — covering Thai IP, immigration, corporate law, litigation, and taxation.
insights.hero.label: Insights
insights.hero.title:
Relevant Issues.
Tangible Impact
insights.hero.desc: Legal updates, practical guidance, and thought leadership from our team — covering the developments that matter to businesses operating in Thailand.
insights.featured.title: Thailand's LTR Visa: A Practical Guide for Qualifying Applicants in 2026
insights.featured.summary: A comprehensive walkthrough of the Long-Term Resident Visa programme — eligibility criteria, required documentation, processing timelines, and the tax advantages that make it one of Southeast Asia's most attractive residency options.
insights.article1.title: Madrid Protocol Designations into Thailand: What Applicants Need to Know
insights.article1.excerpt: Recent changes to the DIP's examination practices for international trademark registrations designating Thailand — and how they affect filing strategy for foreign brand owners.
insights.article2.title: BOI Investment Promotion in 2026: Updated Incentives and Eligible Activities
insights.article2.excerpt: An overview of the Board of Investment's revised promotion categories, enhanced tax incentives for targeted industries, and practical considerations for companies applying this year.
insights.article3.title: Digital Work Permits: Transitioning from Paper to the DWP System
insights.article3.excerpt: Thailand's shift to digital work permits — what employers need to update, how the verification process works, and common issues we're seeing in practice.
insights.article4.title: Enforcing IP Rights in the CIPITC: Recent Developments in Damages Awards
insights.article4.excerpt: An analysis of recent Central Intellectual Property and International Trade Court decisions on damages calculation in trademark infringement cases — and what they signal for rights holders.
insights.article5.title: Transfer Pricing in Thailand: Preparing for Revenue Department Audits
insights.article5.excerpt: With the Revenue Department increasing its focus on related-party transactions, here's what multinational groups operating in Thailand should have in place.
insights.article6.title: Using the Patent Prosecution Highway to Accelerate Thai Patent Grants
insights.article6.excerpt: A step-by-step guide to leveraging the PPH agreement between the Thai DIP and the Japan Patent Office — eligibility, documentation, and typical timelines.
insights.article7.title: Navigating the Foreign Business Act: When Do You Need an FBL?
insights.article7.excerpt: A practical breakdown of which business activities require a Foreign Business Licence in Thailand, common structuring approaches, and the application process.
insights.article8.title: Smart Visa Update: Expanded Categories and Streamlined Processing
insights.article8.excerpt: Thailand's Smart Visa programme has expanded its eligible industries and simplified the endorsement process — here's what qualifies and how to apply.
insights.article9.title: Enforcing Foreign Arbitral Awards in Thailand Under the New York Convention
insights.article9.excerpt: Key considerations for parties seeking to enforce international arbitral awards in Thai courts — procedural requirements, common grounds for challenge, and recent court trends.
